problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
hypothesis: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Attention. Attention mechanism with linear complexity directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Comparative ablation study with 2 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
